records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did we get them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did we get them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did we get them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You knew that those things were C.O.s? So you aren't an ordinary person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You knew that those things were C.O.s? So you aren't an ordinary person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You knew that those things were C.O.s? So you aren't an ordinary person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s are entities that shouldn't be known to the public. But you are able to recognize them right away,
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s are entities that shouldn't be known to the public. But you are able to recognize them right away,
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s are entities that shouldn't be known to the public. But you are able to recognize them right away,

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I knew it
8v I knew you were actually performing a secret operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I knew it
8v I knew you were actually performing a secret operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I knew it
8v I knew you were actually performing a secret operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The existence of C.O.s is said to have been gradually observed since before the Grand Purification War.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The existence of C.O.s is said to have been gradually observed since before the Grand Purification War.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The existence of C.O.s is said to have been gradually observed since before the Grand Purification War.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone who has even the slightest interest in history would know this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone who has even the slightest interest in history would know this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone who has even the slightest interest in history would know this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And weren't you paying attention earlier? The Grand Purification War and the emergence of TASKFORCEs are inseparable from C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And weren't you paying attention earlier? The Grand Purification War and the emergence of TASKFORCEs are inseparable from C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And weren't you paying attention earlier? The Grand Purification War and the emergence of TASKFORCEs are inseparable from C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Operation North Pole, the launch of TASKFORCE No. 1 Delta Seven... Oh! Speaking of Lotus, you can't leave out the city with a thousand-year history, Eridu, too. Eridu was referred to by a different name twenty years ago...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Operation North Pole, the launch of TASKFORCE No. 1 Delta Seven... Oh! Speaking of Lotus, you can't leave out the city with a thousand-year history, Eridu, too. Eridu was referred to by a different name twenty years ago...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Operation North Pole, the launch of TASKFORCE No. 1 Delta Seven... Oh! Speaking of Lotus, you can't leave out the city with a thousand-year history, Eridu, too. Eridu was referred to by a different name twenty years ago...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
...That
8ks enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
...That
8ks enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
...That
8ks enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lot has happened while you were asleep, Miss Aditya!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lot has happened while you were asleep, Miss Aditya!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lot has happened while you were asleep, Miss Aditya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! This is common knowledge that I'm generously explaining to someone who knows nothing! Common knowledge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! This is common knowledge that I'm generously explaining to someone who knows nothing! Common knowledge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! This is common knowledge that I'm generously explaining to someone who knows nothing! Common knowledge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't anyone react the way I did if they suddenly woke up and twenty years had gone by?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't anyone react the way I did if they suddenly woke up and twenty years had gone by?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't anyone react the way I did if they suddenly woke up and twenty years had gone by?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm sorry. I wasn't trying to make fun of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm sorry. I wasn't trying to make fun of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm sorry. I wasn't trying to make fun of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. Then, even back in the old days, the technology existed to put people into cryogenic sleep?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. Then, even back in the old days, the technology existed to put people into cryogenic sleep?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. Then, even back in the old days, the technology existed to put people into cryogenic sleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old days...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old days...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old days...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you a test subject for a secret company? Or maybe even a mad scientist? Ooh! What about a villain's secret weapon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you a test subject for a secret company? Or maybe even a mad scientist? Ooh! What about a villain's secret weapon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you a test subject for a secret company? Or maybe even a mad scientist? Ooh! What about a villain's secret weapon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe there was a part of history that I knew nothing about!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe there was a part of history that I knew nothing about!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe there was a part of history that I knew nothing about!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Freemasonry? Illuminati? Oh! Do reptilians really exist?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Freemasonry? Illuminati? Oh! Do reptilians really exist?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Freemasonry? Illuminati? Oh! Do reptilians really exist?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. I guess not. Anyway! I'm glad you got rid of the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. I guess not. Anyway! I'm glad you got rid of the C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. I guess not. Anyway! I'm glad you got rid of the C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* ...Let's get back on topic. Is there anyone who knew your father?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* ...Let's get back on topic. Is there anyone who knew your father?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* ...Let's get back on topic. Is there anyone who knew your father?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your mother, neighbors, relatives, or even a record in some document.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your mother, neighbors, relatives, or even a record in some document.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your mother, neighbors, relatives, or even a record in some document.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After my mother passed away from the Corruption Disaster, I've been wandering around to survive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After my mother passed away from the Corruption Disaster, I've been wandering around to survive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After my mother passed away from the Corruption Disaster, I've been wandering around to survive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Starting from Gronia, there is not a place that I haven't been to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Starting from Gronia, there is not a place that I haven't been to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Starting from Gronia, there is not a place that I haven't been to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the process, I've met a few people who knew my mother, but not a single one knew who my father was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the process, I've met a few people who knew my mother, but not a single one knew who my father was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the process, I've met a few people who knew my mother, but not a single one knew who my father was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen my birth certificate, but there were no traces of him even there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen my birth certificate, but there were no traces of him even there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen my birth certificate, but there were no traces of him even there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm certain... that there must be something my father left me. So odd, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm certain... that there must be something my father left me. So odd, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm certain... that there must be something my father left me. So odd, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, the compass that was pointing to you, and an empty photo paper that I found inside an album back home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, the compass that was pointing to you, and an empty photo paper that I found inside an album back home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, the compass that was pointing to you, and an empty photo paper that I found inside an album back home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are definitely signs that he existed, but I've lost all means to prove it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are definitely signs that he existed, but I've lost all means to prove it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are definitely signs that he existed, but I've lost all means to prove it.
